sglang.title: [model-gateway] Replace tokenizer with tokenizer registry for dynamic tokenizer loading in gRPC router
sglang.author: YouNeedCryDear
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR addresses a key limitation in the SGLang router: the inability to support gRPC workers without predefined tokenizer-path or model-path. Currently, gRPC routers require tokenizer paths at startup, making multi-model serving with dynamic worker registration impossible.
This work imp

sglang.title: Fix Illegal Memory Access when fa3 + spec + topk + page_size > 1
sglang.author: yubofredwang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
See: #14624
In the previous implementation, we did not correctly handle the page_table and lead to IMA because we did not add the first last_partial_page before decode step pages when calculating the expand_metadata's page table. This PR fixes it.
Modifications

max

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Set TORCH_NCCL_BLOCKING_WAIT Distributed Tests On ROCm
vllm.author: micah-wil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We've been seeing failures like this for several of the distributed test groups:
Process group watchdog thread terminated with exception: HIP error: operation not permitted when stream is capturing

After investigation, we found that it is due to a known HIP runtime bug that is tracked here: ROCm/hi

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Ignore data_parallel_size_local
vllm.author: rjrock
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
In order to run an API only server with headless engines, the data_parallel_size_local factor needs to be ignored.
Test Plan
TP_SIZE=1 DP_SIZE=4 pytest -v -s v1/distributed/test_internal_lb_dp.py::test_api_only_multinode_dp_completion
Alternatively, by running commands in the data parallel d
